description:
Verso, left side:
The last page contains a collection of legal statements made by different people to someone investigating what happened with a sum of money. Written in a different hand than the other pages. The beginning is missing. The first speaker says something about "from Qūṣ and down" and that "I paid the aforementioned sum to them. . . above Qūṣ. I paid the aforementioned sum to the gentile." Then Abū l-Maḥāsin al-Ṣayrafī al-Tifʾeret says that he met with al-Shaykh al-Muhadhdhab, who told him that Hiba came and said that a gentile came who "knew the location of Abū l-Fakhr, and we loaned(?) the gentile 20 dinars." (The writer inserts here "just like his brother mentioned earlier.") However, it was also "said to us" that this gentile was never acquainted with Abū l-Fakhr and did not go up to Qūṣ and did not know where Abū l-Fakhr was. Rather, Abū l-ʿAlāʾ Ibn Sakkāk is the one who knows him. Then this speaker says "I met after this with al-Muhadhdhab and told him what Hiba said to me, and he (al-Muhadhdhab) said, 'Even if the gentile wasn't the one who went up to Qūṣ, he must have heard about Abū l-Fakhr.' I asked al-Muhadhdhab about the gold, and he said, 'It's with me, by way of deposit for the gentile, and I haven't yet paid it to him, not until Abū l-Majd comes.' I met with Munā b. Tamīm who said to hme that he was sitting at the gate, and al-Muhadhdhab went up to the house. . . ." It cuts off here.
description_he: וורסו, צד שמאל: הדף האחרון מכיל אוסף של הצהרות משפטיות של אנשים שונים למישהו החוקר מה קרה עם סכום כסף. כתוב בכתב יד שונה מהדפים האחרים. התחלתו חסרה. הדובר הראשון מספר על 'מקוס ולמטה' ושילם סכום מסוים. אבו אל-מחאסן אל-צייראפי אל-תיפארת מספר על פגישה עם אל-שיח' אל-מוהד'ד'ב שסיפר לו על ניסיון לאתר את אבו אל-פח'ר. הסיפור מסתבך עם עדויות סותרות, הלוואות לגוי, ומי מכיר למעשה את מיקומו של אבו אל-פח'ר. נקטע.
